title: sisyphus-storyboard-page-sp01
prompt: Use the reference image as the establishing WIDE shot of a scene. Design a STORYBOARD PAGE that covers this scene: render ONE image laid out as a clean 3x2 grid of six comic storyboard panels with thin black borders and white gutters between them. Each panel is a DIFFERENT camera setup of this SAME scene, character, set, and art style. Panels: (A) wide establishing of the whole derelict transit hall; (B) medium on the stooped old man at the stalled shopping cart; (C) close-up on the old man's bowed, weary face; (D) low angle looking up the broken escalator into the dark tunnel; (E) high reverse from the top of the escalator looking down at the tiny figure far below; (F) insert detail of the jammed cart wheel and spilled contents. Keep the SAME character, set, and litho-crayon duotone style across every panel. Beneath each panel, in the white gutter, print a clear capital letter label: A, B, C, D, E, F. Warm cream paper, dusty rose-pink and Prussian blue ink.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Match the exact art style, palette, color, rendering technique, line quality, and medium of the reference image — reproduce its look precisely across every panel. Do not introduce any style not present in the reference.
